meaning: n.(身体的)姿势,体态,状态,情况,心境,态度v.令取某种姿势,摆姿势,作出姿态
examples: Good posture helps your bust look bigger.
Back pains can be the result of bad posture.
Exercise, fresh air, and good posture are all helpful.
Change your arm position and see if she will match your movement into the new posture.
Admittedly, adopting a posture of liberty won't resolve every internal disagreement within the GOP.
